name: World Step Exploration Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.80
description: D100 table for determining exploration outcomes in the World Step

1-10.narrative: Despite thorough searching, you find nothing of value in the area

11-20.narrative: You discover some minor salvageable materials

21-30.narrative: A thorough search reveals valuable scrap and components

31-35.description: Found 3 credits worth of valuable items
31-35.narrative: Your exploration uncovers a cache of valuable materials

36-40.description: Found 4 credits worth of excellent salvage
36-40.narrative: Exceptional luck leads to discovery of high-value salvage

41-45.description: Found 5 credits worth of outstanding materials
41-45.narrative: You strike gold with an incredible salvage discovery

46-50.narrative: You discover useful equipment abandoned or overlooked by others

51-55.narrative: Your search turns up functional gear that could prove useful

56-60.narrative: A hidden cache reveals military equipment left behind

61-65.narrative: Advanced technology hidden away from prying eyes

66-70.description: Found a rare or unique item
66-70.narrative: Exceptional luck leads to the discovery of something truly special

71-75.description: Learned a rumor about potential opportunities
71-75.narrative: Local contacts share information about interesting opportunities

76-80.description: Made contact with a potential patron
76-80.narrative: Your exploration leads to contact with someone who might have work

81-85.description: Gained 1 Story Point from significant discovery
81-85.narrative: Your exploration uncovers something that could prove significant later

86-90.narrative: The exploring character has a meaningful encounter during their search

91-93.narrative: Your exploration leads to a dangerous situation requiring quick thinking

94-96.description: Combat encounter - roll on enemy tables
94-96.narrative: Your exploration attracts unwanted attention from hostile forces

97-98.narrative: An exceptional discovery that provides significant resources

99.description: Exceptional find worth 8 credits and 1 Story Point
99.narrative: A once-in-a-lifetime discovery that could change everything

100.description: Legendary discovery - 10 credits, 2 Story Points, and unique equipment
100.narrative: A discovery that will be remembered for generations

SAVVY.description: Savvy characters are better at spotting opportunities

TECH.description: Tech skill helps identify valuable technology

FRONTIER.description: Frontier worlds have more undiscovered opportunities

CIVILIZED.description: Well-explored civilized worlds offer fewer discoveries

CORPORATE.description: Corporate worlds are thoroughly monitored and searched

LOW_TECH.description: Low-tech worlds have limited valuable technology

survey_tools.description: Professional survey equipment greatly aids exploration

combat_armor.description: Protection allows exploration of dangerous areas

multiple_explorers.rule: Each additional explorer beyond the first adds +5 to the roll
multiple_explorers.description: Multiple explorers can cover more ground effectively

dangerous_results.description: Some exploration results involve immediate peril

equipment_finds.rule: Equipment finds should be rolled on appropriate equipment tables
equipment_finds.description: Use equipment generation tables for specific item details

patron_contacts.rule: Patron contacts may provide benefits in future turns
patron_contacts.description: New patron relationships have lasting campaign value
